items.raw_desc: Üvegfólia FIXED FullGlue-Cover Xiaomi Redmi A5 üvegfólia - fekete:A szuper FIXED üvegfólia azon kívül, hogy véd a karcoktól, leejtés esetén is tompítja az ütést. Xiaomi Redmi A5 telefonhoz lehet használni. 9H keménységgel rendelkezik, így tökéletesen óvja a kijelzőt a sérülésektől. A védő üvegfólia külső oldala olyan kezelt felülettel rendelkezik, amely gondoskodik arról, hogy az ujjlenyomatok ne tapadjanak meg rajta. Exercising with the hoop will help to slim the abdomen and waist and also reduce the tissues of the thighs and buttocks. The structure is composed of 24 parts, but at least 14 parts are needed to close the hoop. The individual parts conceal a rail into which an anchor fitted with 4 ball bearing castors is inserted before closing. A weight weighing 300 g is then attached to the anchor using a length-adjustable string. The string can be adjusted to a length of 20-30 cm, the longer it is, the heavier the weight will be due to centrifugal force. items.desc: Kerékpár kitámasztó MAX1 - hátsó, univerzális, 26 - 29", fekete: Key Features of MAX1 Rear Universal Bike Stand 26 - 29", BlackAluminium alloy bodySize adjustment with extendable feetUpright for greater stabilityFor whe…
items.raw_desc: Kerékpár kitámasztó MAX1 - hátsó, univerzális, 26 - 29", fekete:                Key Features of MAX1 Rear Universal Bike Stand 26 - 29", BlackAluminium alloy bodySize adjustment with extendable feetUpright for greater stabilityFor wheels 26"- 29"Non-slip end capWeight 263 gBike frame mounting:Mount on the left side of the rear structure in front of the foot. First unscrew the 4 Allen screws (M6 Allen No.5) and loosen the rear washer. Attach the stand to the rear structure, attach the washer from the other side and replace the 2 lower Allen screws and tighten lightly. Then position the upper strut with the clamp, insert the top 2 screws, position the stand accurately (check that the stand does not interfere with the rear wheel splash and the foot movement trajectory when pedalling) and tighten all 4 screws one by one. Then release the extendable foot on the folding leg of the stand and place it in the optimal position so that the bike stands on the stand by itself. Recommended to be installed in a professional service.
